title: Schedule 1: Application for Permanent Residence Under the Temporary Public Policy to Facilitate the Issuance of Permanent Residence Visas to Certain Colombian, Haitian, and Venezuelan Nationals with Family in Canada (IMM 5989) - Canada.ca
content:
## Schedule 1: Application for Permanent Residence Under the Temporary Public Policy to Facilitate the Issuance of Permanent Residence Visas to Certain Colombian, Haitian, and Venezuelan Nationals with Family in Canada (IMM 5989)
Schedule 1: Application for Permanent Residence Under the Temporary Public
                    Policy to Facilitate the Issuance of Permanent Residence Visas to Certain Colombian, Haitian, and
                    Venezuelan Nationals with Family in Canada [IMM 5989] (PDF, 0.3 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”
Read the step by step instructions on how to complete the form.

### Schedule 1 (IMM 5989)
This form must be completed and uploaded by:
- you, the principal applicant

### Section A – Applicant Information
- Enter your full family name (surname or last name) as shown on your
                                passport, travel document or identity document.
- Enter all of your given name(s) (first, second or more) as shown on your
                                passport, travel document or identity document. Do not use initials. Note: If you do not have a family name on your passport or travel
                                    document, enter all given names in the family name field and leave the given name field
                                    blank. If you do not have a given name on your passport or travel document, leave the given name
                                    field blank.
Note: If you do not have a family name on your passport or travel
                                    document, enter all given names in the family name field and leave the given name field
                                    blank.
If you do not have a given name on your passport or travel document, leave the given name
                                    field blank.
- Enter your passport/travel document number, if you do not know the number, leave this space
                                blank.
- Enter date of birth. If you do not know the complete date of birth, use “01” to fill in the
                                spaces for the unknown year, month or day. Include a letter of explanation saying why you
                                could not include the complete date.
- Enter your country or territory of birth.
- Indicate your country of citizenship.
- Enter your current country of residence.
- Enter your telephone number, including the country code, area/regional code.
- Select your current marital status.
- If you have an email address, enter it here (for example, name@provider.net). Note: By indicating your email address, you are hereby authorizing IRCC
                                    to send you correspondence, including personal information, to this specific email
                                    address.
Note: By indicating your email address, you are hereby authorizing IRCC
                                    to send you correspondence, including personal information, to this specific email
                                    address.
- Enter your current residential address (where you live) by typing the following information: Apartment (Apt.) or unit number, if applicable Street number (no.), if applicable. It is the number on your house or apartment
                                        building. Street name, if applicable City or Town Province or State Country Postal code or zip code
- Apartment (Apt.) or unit number, if applicable
- Street number (no.), if applicable. It is the number on your house or apartment
                                        building.
- Street name, if applicable
- Postal code or zip code

### Section B – Requirements of the Public Policy
Answer each question by checking the appropriate box.
If you answered “Yes” to question 3, you must provide the name of your anchor, describe the
                            relationship with you and provide documentation to demonstrate the relationship between you and
                            your anchor.

### Section C – Pre-arrival Facilitations
Answer yes or no by checking the appropriate box.

### Section D and E – Consent and Declaration
Carefully read section D, sign Section E to provide your consent and upload the form to your
                            online application.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
